title: Deep learning model for medical image classification
abstract: This study proposes a convolutional neural network for classifying medical images and compares model performance across benchmark datasets.

title: Secure routing protocol for wireless sensor networks
abstract: This paper presents a secure routing method for wireless sensor networks using trust scoring and lightweight cryptographic verification.

title: Query optimization strategy for distributed relational databases
abstract: We introduce a cost-based query optimization approach to reduce execution time in distributed relational database systems.
